name: Cranberry Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the jello in 1/4 cup hot water.
2. Grind the cranberries, orange, nuts, and celery in a meat grinder.
3. Add the sugar to the ground mixture and stir until combined.
4. Let the mixture set for at least one hour.
5. Stir in the cooled jello.
6. Serve when set. Whipped cream is an optional topping.
